name: Taco Filling W/Homemade Taco Seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a medium skillet over medium-high heat, draining any excess grease.
2. Add water and the taco seasoning mix to the skillet.
3. Reduce the heat and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Makes enough filling for 8-10 tacos.
